title: triticum neglectum
intro: Triticum neglectum, also known as wild einkorn, is a type of ancient wheat that is closely related to the domesticated einkorn wheat (Triticum monococcum). It is a perennial plant with a rich history, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, offering benefits like reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and boosted immune system. Triticum neglectum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, allowing for various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
